raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "x must be a number",
    "y must be a number"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "result is a float",
    "result has the magnitude of x",
    "result has the sign of y"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "x is zero",
    "y is zero",
    "x is negative infinity",
    "x is positive infinity",
    "y is negative infinity",
    "y is positive infinity",
    "x is NaN",
    "y is NaN"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
{
  "preconditions": [
    "x must be a float",
    "y must be a float"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "The result is a float",
    "The magnitude of the result is the absolute value of x",
    "The sign of the result is the sign of y"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "If x is 0, the result is 0",
    "If y is 0, the result is 0",
    "If x is NaN, the result is NaN",
    "If y is NaN, the result is NaN"
  ]
}

  ]
}
